values.value: Carmignac_Investissement_Latitude_CIL__c:Carmignac Investment Latitude (CIL);Carmignac_Long_Short_Eur_Equities_CLSEE__c:Carmignac Long Short European Equities (CLSEE/PLSEE);Carmignac_Global_Market_Neutral_CGMN__c:Carmignac Global Market Neutral (CGMN);Carmignac_Alt_European_Long_Short_CAELS__c:Carmignac Alt European Long Short (CAELS);Carmignac_Merger_Arbitrage_CMA__c:Carmignac Merger Arbitrage (CMA);Carmignac_Merger_Arbitrage_Plus_CMAP__c:Carmignac Merger Arbitrage Plus (CMAP);Carmignac_Credit_Opportunities_CCO__c:Carmignac Credit Opportunities (CCO)
